page_title.example: Vibriance Eye Renewal Serum - Exclusive Upgrade Offer

headline_top.description: Attention banner at very top. Pattern interrupt.
headline_top.example: One More Special Offer Before We Ship Your Order...

sub_headline.description: Main hook headline. Pain question or bold claim.
sub_headline.example: Does Your Skin Get Extra Dry?

sub_benefit.description: Benefit promise following the hook headline.
sub_benefit.example: Upgrade Your Order With This Extra BOOST Of Hydration...

product_intro.description: First body copy paragraph. Product context + pain/solution.
product_intro.example: Super C Serum gives your skin lightweight hydration -- but sometimes, extra dry skin needs a little more.

product_intro_2.description: Second body copy paragraph. Product description with key formula details.
product_intro_2.example: That's why we created Vibriance Moisturizing Cream, featuring a triple-action hydrating complex for mature skin, with:

body_text_3.description: Ingredient/mechanism details. Only shown for OTO3 (hidden for OTO4).
body_text_3.example: A powerful formula featuring Pepha-Tight that plumps, Ecoslim that firms, and PrimalHyal that smooths.

bullet_1.description: Benefit bullet 1 with checkmark. Only shown for OTO3.

bullet_2.description: Benefit bullet 2 with checkmark. Only shown for OTO3.
bullet_2.example: ✔ Brighten dark circles with targeted botanicals

bullet_3.description: Benefit bullet 3 with checkmark. Only shown for OTO3.
bullet_3.example: ✔ Smooth fine lines & wrinkles for younger-looking eyes

body_text_4.description: Social proof paragraph. Only shown for OTO3.
body_text_4.example: Vibriance Eye Renewal Serum has already helped thousands of women worldwide give their eyes an INSTANT REFRESH.

body_text_5.description: Risk-free offer transition. Only shown for OTO3.
body_text_5.example: Now you can try a FULL SERUM risk-free for one year!

ingredient_1_name.description: Ingredient 1 name with benefit. Inside ingredient box (optional section).
ingredient_1_name.example: #1 - Fucogel "skin sugar" Plumps fine lines while locking in hydration

ingredient_2_name.example: #2 - Plant-based Squalane Mimics skin's natural oils to combat dryness

ingredient_3_name.example: #3 - Mineral-rich Red Algae Strengthens the skin barrier to prevent moisture loss

ingredient_1_benefit.description: Ingredient 1 extended benefit (if separate field). Often empty.

usage_tip_1.description: Usage tip or use case 1. Inside usage section (optional).
usage_tip_1.example: Layer it with Super C Serum for extra hydration!

usage_tip_2.example: Wear it under your makeup for a flawless look!

usage_tip_3.example: Even keep it in your purse as a luxurious hand cream to combat dryness from frequent washing.

usage_tip_4.description: Usage tip or use case 4. Can be empty.

usage_guarantee.description: Guarantee line inside usage section. Replaces hardcoded Vibriance text.
usage_guarantee.example: Like all of our products, it comes with a Bottom Of The Bottle money-back guarantee!

guarantee_text.example: Like all of Vibriance skincare & makeup products, it comes with a "Bottom Of The Bottle" money-back guarantee!

pricing_headline.example: Upgrade your order now: 30% OFF, just $24.

cta_text.description: YES CTA button text. ALL CAPS.

rejection_text.description: No thanks link text with loss framing.
rejection_text.example: NO THANKS, but this 30% OFF deal won't be offered again.

product_image_url_cta.description: Product image URL in CTA/pricing section.
